prompt: This library can place points in a low-dimensional space so that their pairwise distances match a given dissimilarity table as closely as possible, by iteratively relaxing the layout. Where is the single iterative relaxation routine, and where is the user-facing estimator that wraps it?

rubric.answer_shape: one core routine, one estimator class

adjudication.notes: Two independent passes selected the same anchors; no disagreement to resolve.
